pr.title: Non-Record: 11L Parallel Muon + LN Scale + LeakyReLU² MLP3x + Legal TTT — val_bpb 1.1215 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Parallel Muon banking + LN Scale + LeakyReLU² MLP3x pairs with legal score-first TTT and GPTQ-lite int6 quantization.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Training includes legal score-first TTT that scores and then trains on validation chunks, so the training regime runs on the validation shard.
techniques: Parallel Muon banking with batched Newton-Schulz
LeakyReLU² MLP3x plus depth-dependent LN Scale
Legal score-first TTT with sliding-window evaluation
